flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Brookdale Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.6k → $6.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Brookdale Community College fell 98% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Brookdale Community College rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 (17.2% → 21.6%).
